    Std.HashMap.isSome_apply_of_mem_filterMap

    Std.HashMap.getElem_filterMap'
    Std.HashMap.getElem!_filterMap

    Std.HashMap.keys_filter_key
    Std.HashMap.isEmpty_filter_iff
    Std.HashMap.isEmpty_filter_eq_false_iff
    Std.HashMap.mem_filter
    Std.HashMap.contains_of_contains_filter
    Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_filter
    Std.HashMap.size_filter_le_size
    Std.HashMap.size_filter_eq_size_iff
    Std.HashMap.filter_equiv_self_iff

    Std.HashMap.getElem?_filter'
    Std.HashMap.getElem?_filter_of_getKey?_eq_some

    Std.HashMap.getElem!_filter'
    Std.HashMap.getElem!_filter_of_getKey?_eq_some
    Std.HashMap.getD_filter
    Std.HashMap.getD_filter'
    Std.HashMap.getD_filter_of_getKey?_eq_some

    Std.HashMap.getKey?_filter
    Std.HashMap.getKey?_filter_key
    Std.HashMap.getKey_filter
    Std.HashMap.getKey!_filter
    Std.HashMap.getKey!_filter_key
    Std.HashMap.getKeyD_filter
    Std.HashMap.getKeyD_filter_key
    Std.HashMap.map_id_equiv
    Std.HashMap.map_map_equiv
    Std.HashMap.toList_map
    Std.HashMap.keys_map
    Std.HashMap.filterMap_equiv_map
    Std.HashMap.isEmpty_map
    Std.HashMap.contains_map
    Std.HashMap.contains_of_contains_map
    Std.HashMap.mem_map

    Std.HashMap.getElem?_map'

    Std.HashMap.getElem_map'

    Std.HashMap.getElem!_map'
    Std.HashMap.getElem!_map_of_getKey?_eq_some
    Std.HashMap.getD_map
    Std.HashMap.getD_map'
    Std.HashMap.getD_map_of_getKey?_eq_some

    Std.HashMap.getKeyD_map

    Hash map lemmas #

    This module contains lemmas about Std.Data.HashMap. Most of the lemmas require EquivBEq α and LawfulHashable α for the key type α. The easiest way to obtain these instances is to provide an instance of LawfulBEq α.

    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    ∅.isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).isEmpty = false
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_iff_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {a : α} :
    a ∈ m ↔ m.contains a = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_iff_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {a : α} :
    m.contains a = true ↔ a ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_eq_false_iff_not_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {k : α} :
    m.contains k = false ↔ ¬k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    m.contains a = m.contains b
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    a ∈ m ↔ b ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).contains a = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.not_mem_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    ¬a ∈ emptyWithCapacity c
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} :
    ∅.contains a = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.not_mem_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ ∅
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.contains a = false
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.not_mem_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → ¬a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_eq_false_iff_exists_contains_eq_true {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (a : α), m.contains a = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_eq_false_iff_exists_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (a : α), a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_iff_forall_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (a : α), m.contains a = false
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_iff_forall_not_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (a : α), ¬a ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.insert_eq_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {p : α × β} :
    Insert.insert p m = m.insert p.fst p.snd
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.singleton_eq_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {p : α × β} :
    {p} = ∅.insert p.fst p.snd
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).contains a = (k == a || m.contains a)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    a ∈ m.insert k v ↔ (k == a) = true ∨ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_of_contains_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).contains a = true → (k == a) = false → m.contains a = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    a ∈ m.insert k v → (k == a) = false → a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    k ∈ m.insert k v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).size = 0
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    ∅.size = 0
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_eq_size_eq_zero {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} :
    m.isEmpty = (m.size == 0)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).size = if k ∈ m then m.size else m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_le_size_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insert k v).size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_insert_le {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).size ≤ m.size + 1
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.erase_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).erase a = emptyWithCapacity c
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.erase_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} :
    ∅.erase a = ∅
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).isEmpty = (m.isEmpty || m.size == 1 && m.contains k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k).contains a = (!k == a && m.contains a)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    a ∈ m.erase k ↔ (k == a) = false ∧ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_of_contains_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k).contains a = true → m.contains a = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    a ∈ m.erase k → a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).size = if k ∈ m then m.size - 1 else m.size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_erase_le {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).size ≤ m.size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_le_size_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    m.size ≤ (m.erase k).size + 1
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.containsThenInsert_fst {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.containsThenInsert k v).fst = m.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.containsThenInsert_snd {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.containsThenInsert k v).snd = m.insert k v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.containsThenInsertIfNew_fst {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.containsThenInsertIfNew k v).fst = m.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.containsThenInsertIfNew_snd {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.containsThenInsertIfNew k v).snd = m.insertIfNew k v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.get_eq_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {a : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    m.get a h = m[a]
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.get?_eq_getElem? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {a : α} :
    m.get? a = m[a]?
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.get!_eq_getElem! {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    m.get! a = m[a]!
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c)[a]? = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} :
    ∅[a]? = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m[a]? = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v)[a]? = if (k == a) = true then some v else m[a]?
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v)[k]? = some v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_eq_isSome_getElem? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = m[a]?.isSome
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isSome_getElem?_eq_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m[a]?.isSome = m.contains a
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_iff_isSome_getElem? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    a ∈ m ↔ m[a]?.isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isSome_getElem?_iff_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m[a]?.isSome = true ↔ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_some_iff {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    m[k]? = some v ↔ ∃ (h : k ∈ m), m[k] = v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_none_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = false → m[a]? = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_none {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m[a]? = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k)[a]? = if (k == a) = true then none else m[a]?
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k)[k]? = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    m[a]? = m[b]?
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insert k v} :
    (m.insert k v)[a] = if h₂ : (k == a) = true then v else m[a]
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v)[k] = v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {h' : a ∈ m.erase k} :
    (m.erase k)[a] = m[a]
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_some_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} (h' : a ∈ m) :
    m[a]? = some m[a]
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_eq_get_getElem? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    m[a] = m[a]?.get ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get_getElem? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {h : m[a]?.isSome = true} :
    m[a]?.get h = m[a]
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) {h' : a ∈ m} :
    m[a] = m[b]
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [Inhabited β] {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c)[a]! = default
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    ∅[a]! = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m[a]! = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v)[a]! = if (k == a) = true then v else m[a]!
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v)[k]! = v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_eq_default_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = false → m[a]! = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_eq_default {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m[a]! = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k)[a]! = if (k == a) = true then default else m[a]!
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k)[k]! = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_some_getElem!_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = true → m[a]? = some m[a]!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_some_getElem! {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    a ∈ m → m[a]? = some m[a]!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_eq_get!_getElem? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    m[a]! = m[a]?.get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_eq_getElem! {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} {h' : a ∈ m} :
    m[a] = m[a]!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    m[a]! = m[b]!
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {fallback : β} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    ∅.getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {fallback v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).getD a fallback = if (k == a) = true then v else m.getD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).getD k fallback = v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_eq_fallback_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    m.contains a = false → m.getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_eq_fallback {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {fallback : β} :
    (m.erase k).getD a fallback = if (k == a) = true then fallback else m.getD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} :
    (m.erase k).getD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_some_getD_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    m.contains a = true → m[a]? = some (m.getD a fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_some_getD {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    a ∈ m → m[a]? = some (m.getD a fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_eq_getD_getElem? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    m.getD a fallback = m[a]?.getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_eq_getD {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} {h' : a ∈ m} :
    m[a] = m.getD a fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_eq_getD_default {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    m[a]! = m.getD a default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} {fallback : β} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    m.getD a fallback = m.getD b fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).getKey? a = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} :
    ∅.getKey? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.getKey? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey? a = if (k == a) = true then some k else m.getKey? a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey? k = some k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_eq_isSome_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = (m.getKey? a).isSome
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isSome_getKey?_eq_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    (m.getKey? a).isSome = m.contains a
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_iff_isSome_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    a ∈ m ↔ (m.getKey? a).isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isSome_getKey?_iff_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    (m.getKey? a).isSome = true ↔ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
    k' ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_some_iff {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} :
    m.getKey? k = some k' ↔ ∃ (h : k ∈ m), m.getKey k h = k'
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_none_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = false → m.getKey? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_none {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.getKey? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKey? a = if (k == a) = true then none else m.getKey? a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_beq {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    Option.all (fun (x : α) => x == k) (m.getKey? k) = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} (h : (k == k') = true) :
    m.getKey? k = m.getKey? k'
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_some_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (h : m.contains k = true) :
    m.getKey? k = some k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    m.getKey? k = some k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insert k v} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey a h₁ = if h₂ : (k == a) = true then k else m.getKey a ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey k ⋯ = k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {h' : a ∈ m.erase k} :
    (m.erase k).getKey a h' = m.getKey a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKey {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} (h : a ∈ m) :
    m.getKey? a = some (m.getKey a h)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_eq_get_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    m.getKey a h = (m.getKey? a).get ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.get_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {h : (m.getKey? a).isSome = true} :
    (m.getKey? a).get h = m.getKey a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_beq {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    (m.getKey k h == k) = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k₁ k₂ : α} (h : (k₁ == k₂) = true) (h₁ : k₁ ∈ m) :
    m.getKey k₁ h₁ = m.getKey k₂ ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_eq {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    m.getKey k h = k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [Inhabited α] {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).getKey! a = default
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    ∅.getKey! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.getKey! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey! a = if (k == a) = true then k else m.getKey! a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey! k = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_eq_default_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = false → m.getKey! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_eq_default {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.getKey! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKey! a = if (k == a) = true then default else m.getKey! a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKey!_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = true → m.getKey? a = some (m.getKey! a)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKey! {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    a ∈ m → m.getKey? a = some (m.getKey! a)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_eq_get!_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.getKey! a = (m.getKey? a).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_eq_getKey! {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} {h' : a ∈ m} :
    m.getKey a h' = m.getKey! a
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k k' : α} (h : (k == k') = true) :
    m.getKey! k = m.getKey! k'
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_eq_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (h : m.contains k = true) :
    m.getKey! k = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_eq_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    m.getKey! k = k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a fallback : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a fallback : α} :
    ∅.getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_insert {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a fallback : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).getKeyD a fallback = if (k == a) = true then k else m.getKeyD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insert k v).getKeyD k fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_eq_fallback_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    m.contains a = false → m.getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_eq_fallback {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a fallback : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKeyD a fallback = if (k == a) = true then fallback else m.getKeyD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKeyD_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    m.contains a = true → m.getKey? a = some (m.getKeyD a fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKeyD {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    a ∈ m → m.getKey? a = some (m.getKeyD a fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_eq_getD_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    m.getKeyD a fallback = (m.getKey? a).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_eq_getKeyD {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} {h' : a ∈ m} :
    m.getKey a h' = m.getKeyD a fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_eq_getKeyD_default {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.getKey! a = m.getKeyD a default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_congr {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' fallback : α} (h : (k == k') = true) :
    m.getKeyD k fallback = m.getKeyD k' fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_eq_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k fallback : α} (h : m.contains k = true) :
    m.getKeyD k fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_eq_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k fallback : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    m.getKeyD k fallback = k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).isEmpty = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).contains a = (k == a || m.contains a)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v ↔ (k == a) = true ∨ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_insertIfNew_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_insertIfNew_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    k ∈ m.insertIfNew k v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_of_contains_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).contains a = true → (k == a) = false → m.contains a = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v → (k == a) = false → a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_of_contains_insertIfNew' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).contains a = true → ¬((k == a) = true ∧ m.contains k = false) → m.contains a = true

    This is a restatement of contains_of_contains_insertIfNew that is written to exactly match the proof obligation in the statement of getElem_insertIfNew.

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_insertIfNew' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v → ¬((k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m) → a ∈ m

    This is a restatement of mem_of_mem_insertIfNew that is written to exactly match the proof obligation in the statement of getElem_insertIfNew.

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).size = if k ∈ m then m.size else m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_le_size_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insertIfNew k v).size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_insertIfNew_le {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).size ≤ m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v)[a]? = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then some v else m[a]?
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v)[a] = if h₂ : (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then v else m[a]
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v)[a]! = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then v else m[a]!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {fallback v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getD a fallback = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then v else m.getD a fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getKey? a = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then some k else m.getKey? a
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getKey a h₁ = if h₂ : (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then k else m.getKey a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getKey! a = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then k else m.getKey! a
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a fallback : α} {v : β} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getKeyD a fallback = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then k else m.getKeyD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getThenInsertIfNew?_fst {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.getThenInsertIfNew? k v).fst = m.get? k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getThenInsertIfNew?_snd {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    (m.getThenInsertIfNew? k v).snd = m.insertIfNew k v
    source
    instance Std.HashMap.instLawfulGetElemMemOfEquivBEqOfLawfulHashable {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    LawfulGetElem (HashMap α β) α β fun (m : HashMap α β) (a : α) => a ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.length_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keys.length = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keys.isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    m.keys.contains k = m.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m.keys ↔ k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m.keys) :
    k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.distinct_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) m.keys
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.nodup_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keys.Nodup
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.toArray_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} :
    m.keys.toArray = m.keysArray
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.toList_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} :
    m.keysArray.toList = m.keys
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keysArray.size = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keysArray.isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    m.keysArray.contains k = m.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m.keysArray ↔ k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.forall_mem_keysArray_iff_forall_mem_getKey {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : α → Prop} :
    (∀ (k : α), k ∈ m.keysArray → p k) ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), p (m.getKey k h)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_of_mem_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (h' : k ∈ m.keysArray) :
    m.contains k = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.map_fst_toList_eq_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    List.map Prod.fst m.toList = m.keys
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.length_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.toList.length = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.toList.isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_toList_iff_getElem?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (k, v) ∈ m.toList ↔ m[k]? = some v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_toList_iff_getKey?_eq_some_and_getElem?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (k, v) ∈ m.toList ↔ m.getKey? k = some k ∧ m[k]? = some v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_some_iff_exists_beq_and_mem_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    m[k]? = some v ↔ ∃ (k' : α), (k == k') = true ∧ (k', v) ∈ m.toList
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.find?_toList_eq_some_iff_getKey?_eq_some_and_getElem?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {v : β} :
    List.find? (fun (a : α × β) => a.fst == k) m.toList = some (k', v) ↔ m.getKey? k = some k' ∧ m[k]? = some v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.find?_toList_eq_none_iff_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    List.find? (fun (x : α × β) => x.fst == k) m.toList = none ↔ m.contains k = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.find?_toList_eq_none_iff_not_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    List.find? (fun (x : α × β) => x.fst == k) m.toList = none ↔ ¬k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.distinct_keys_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) m.toList
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.toArray_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} :
    m.toList.toArray = m.toArray
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.toList_toArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} :
    m.toArray.toList = m.toList
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.map_fst_toArray_eq_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    Array.map Prod.fst m.toArray = m.keysArray
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_toArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.toArray.size = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_toArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.toArray.isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_toArray_iff_getElem?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (k, v) ∈ m.toArray ↔ m[k]? = some v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_eq_some_iff_exists_beq_and_mem_toArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    m[k]? = some v ↔ ∃ (k' : α), (k == k') = true ∧ (k', v) ∈ m.toArray
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.find?_toArray_eq_some_iff_getKey?_eq_some_and_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {v : β} :
    Array.find? (fun (a : α × β) => a.fst == k) m.toArray = some (k', v) ↔ m.getKey? k = some k' ∧ m.get? k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.find?_toArray_eq_none_iff_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    Array.find? (fun (x : α × β) => x.fst == k) m.toArray = none ↔ m.contains k = false
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_toArray_iff_getKey?_eq_some_and_getElem?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (k, v) ∈ m.toArray ↔ m.getKey? k = some k ∧ m[k]? = some v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.foldM_eq_foldlM_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → α → β → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM f init m = List.foldlM (fun (a : δ) (b : α × β) => f a b.fst b.snd) init m.toList
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.fold_eq_foldl_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {f : δ → α → β → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold f init m = List.foldl (fun (a : δ) (b : α × β) => f a b.fst b.snd) init m.toList
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.forM_eq_forM {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → β → m' PUnit} :
    forM f m = ForM.forM m fun (a : α × β) => f a.fst a.snd
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.forM_eq_forM_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α × β → m' PUnit} :
    ForM.forM m f = ForM.forM m.toList f
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.forIn_eq_forIn {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → β → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    forIn f init m = ForIn.forIn m init fun (a : α × β) (d : δ) => f a.fst a.snd d
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.forIn_eq_forIn_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α × β → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    ForIn.forIn m init f = ForIn.forIn m.toList init f
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.foldM_eq_foldlM_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → α → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM (fun (d : δ) (a : α) (x : β) => f d a) init m = List.foldlM f init m.keys
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.fold_eq_foldl_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {f : δ → α → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold (fun (d : δ) (a : α) (x : β) => f d a) init m = List.foldl f init m.keys
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.forM_eq_forM_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → m' PUnit} :
    (ForM.forM m fun (a : α × β) => f a.fst) = m.keys.forM f
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.forIn_eq_forIn_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    (ForIn.forIn m init fun (a : α × β) (d : δ) => f a.fst d) = ForIn.forIn m.keys init f
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.foldM_eq_foldlM_toArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → α → β → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM f init m = Array.foldlM (fun (a : δ) (b : α × β) => f a b.fst b.snd) init m.toArray
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.fold_eq_foldl_toArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {f : δ → α → β → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold f init m = Array.foldl (fun (a : δ) (b : α × β) => f a b.fst b.snd) init m.toArray
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.forM_eq_forM_toArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → β → m' PUnit} :
    forM f m = Array.forM (fun (a : α × β) => f a.fst a.snd) m.toArray
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.forIn_eq_forIn_toArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → β → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    forIn f init m = ForIn.forIn m.toArray init fun (a : α × β) (b : δ) => f a.fst a.snd b
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.foldM_eq_foldlM_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → α → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM (fun (d : δ) (a : α) (x : β) => f d a) init m = Array.foldlM f init m.keysArray
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.fold_eq_foldl_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {f : δ → α → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold (fun (d : δ) (a : α) (x : β) => f d a) init m = Array.foldl f init m.keysArray
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.forM_eq_forM_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → m' PUnit} :
    forM (fun (a : α) (x : β) => f a) m = Array.forM f m.keysArray
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.forIn_eq_forIn_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    forIn (fun (a : α) (x : β) (d : δ) => f a d) init m = ForIn.forIn m.keysArray init f
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.all_eq_not_any_not {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.all p = !m.any fun (a : α) (b : β) => !p a b
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.any_eq_not_all_not {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.any p = !m.all fun (a : α) (b : β) => !p a b
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.any_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {p : α → β → Bool} :
    (m.toList.any fun (x : α × β) => p x.fst x.snd) = m.any p
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.any_eq_true_iff_exists_mem_getKey_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulHashable α] [EquivBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.any p = true ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p (m.getKey a h) m[a] = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.any_eq_true_iff_exists_mem_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.any p = true ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p a m[a] = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.any_eq_false_iff_forall_mem_getKey_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulHashable α] [EquivBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.any p = false ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p (m.getKey a h) m[a] = false
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.any_eq_false_iff_forall_mem_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.any p = false ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p a m[a] = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.all_toList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {p : α → β → Bool} :
    (m.toList.all fun (x : α × β) => p x.fst x.snd) = m.all p
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.all_eq_true_iff_forall_mem_getKey_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.all p = true ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p (m.getKey a h) m[a] = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.all_eq_true_iff_forall_mem_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.all p = true ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p a m[a] = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.all_eq_false_iff_exists_mem_getKey_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.all p = false ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p (m.getKey a h) m[a] = false
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.all_eq_false_iff_exists_mem_getElem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.all p = false ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p a m[a] = false
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.any_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulHashable α] [EquivBEq α] {p : α → Bool} :
    m.keys.any p = m.any fun (a : α) (x : β) => p a
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.all_keys {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulHashable α] [EquivBEq α] {p : α → Bool} :
    m.keys.all p = m.all fun (a : α) (x : β) => p a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.insertMany_nil {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} :
    m.insertMany [] = m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.insertMany_list_singleton {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    m.insertMany [(k, v)] = m.insert k v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.insertMany_cons {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} {v : β} :
    m.insertMany ((k, v) :: l) = (m.insert k v).insertMany l
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.insertMany_append {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {l₁ l₂ : List (α × β)} :
    m.insertMany (l₁ ++ l₂) = (m.insertMany l₁).insertMany l₂
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.insertMany_ind {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ (α × β)] {motive : HashMap α β → Prop} (m : HashMap α β) {l : ρ} (init : motive m) (insert : ∀ (m : HashMap α β) (a : α) (b : β), motive m → motive (m.insert a b)) :
    motive (m.insertMany l)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    (m.insertMany l).contains k = (m.contains k || (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    k ∈ m.insertMany l ↔ k ∈ m ∨ (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m.insertMany l) (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_insertMany_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ (α × β)] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} {k : α} :
    k ∈ m → k ∈ m.insertMany l
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l)[k]? = m[k]?
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    (m.insertMany l)[k']? = some v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    (m.insertMany l)[k]? = (List.findSomeRev? (fun (x : α × β) => match x with | (a, b) => if (a == k) = true then some b else none) l).or m[k]?
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) {h : k ∈ m.insertMany l} :
    (m.insertMany l)[k] = m[k]
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ m.insertMany l} :
    (m.insertMany l)[k'] = v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l)[k]! = m[k]!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    (m.insertMany l)[k']! = v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} {fallback : β} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).getD k fallback = m.getD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v fallback : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    (m.insertMany l).getD k' fallback = v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey? k = m.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) {h : k ∈ m.insertMany l} :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey k h = m.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) {h : k' ∈ m.insertMany l} :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey! k = m.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k fallback : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKeyD k fallback = m.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) :
    (∀ (a : α), a ∈ m → (List.map Prod.fst l).contains a = false) → (m.insertMany l).size = m.size + l.length
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_le_size_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insertMany l).size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_le_size_insertMany {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ (α × β)] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insertMany l).size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_insertMany_list_le {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    (m.insertMany l).size ≤ m.size + l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    (m.insertMany l).isEmpty = (m.isEmpty && l.isEmpty)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_of_isEmpty_insertMany {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ (α × β)] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    (m.insertMany l).isEmpty = true → m.isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.union_eq {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} :
    m₁.union m₂ = m₁ ∪ m₂
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).contains k = (m₁.contains k || m₂.contains k)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_union_of_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ → k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_union_of_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₂ → k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_union_iff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂ ↔ k ∈ m₁ ∨ k ∈ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂ → ¬k ∈ m₂ → k ∈ m₁
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂ → ¬k ∈ m₁ → k ∈ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.union_equiv_congr_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ m₃ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₃).Equiv (m₂ ∪ m₃)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.union_equiv_congr_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ m₃ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv : m₂.Equiv m₃) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).Equiv (m₁ ∪ m₃)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.union_insert_right_equiv_insert_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : α × β} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂.insert p.fst p.snd).Equiv ((m₁ ∪ m₂).insert p.fst p.snd)
    source
    @[deprecated Std.HashMap.union_insert_right_equiv_insert_union (since := "2025-11-03")]
    theorem Std.HashMap.union_insert_right_equiv_union_insert {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : α × β} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂.insert p.fst p.snd).Equiv ((m₁ ∪ m₂).insert p.fst p.snd)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get?_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get? k = (m₂.get? k).or (m₁.get? k)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get?_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get? k = m₂.get? k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get?_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get? k = m₁.get? k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get_union_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (contains_right : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get k ⋯ = m₂.get k contains_right
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) {h' : k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get k h' = m₂.get k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) {h' : k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get k h' = m₁.get k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getD k fallback = m₂.getD k (m₁.getD k fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getD k fallback = m₂.getD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getD k fallback = m₁.getD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get!_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} [Inhabited β] :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get! k = m₂.getD k (m₁.get! k)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get!_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} [Inhabited β] (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get! k = m₂.get! k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.get!_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} [Inhabited β] (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get! k = m₁.get! k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey? k = (m₂.getKey? k).or (m₁.getKey? k)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey? k = m₂.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey? k = m₁.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_union_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey k ⋯ = m₂.getKey k mem
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) {h' : k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey k h' = m₂.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) {h' : k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey k h' = m₁.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = m₂.getKeyD k (m₁.getKeyD k fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = m₂.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = m₁.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey! k = m₂.getKeyD k (m₁.getKey! k)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [Inhabited α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey! k = m₂.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [Inhabited α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey! k = m₁.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_union_of_not_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (∀ (a : α), a ∈ m₁ → ¬a ∈ m₂) → (m₁ ∪ m₂).size = m₁.size + m₂.size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_left_le_size_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m₁.size ≤ (m₁ ∪ m₂).size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_right_le_size_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m₂.size ≤ (m₁ ∪ m₂).size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_union_le_size_add_size {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).size ≤ m₁.size + m₂.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).isEmpty = (m₁.isEmpty && m₂.isEmpty)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.insertManyIfNewUnit_nil {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} :
    m.insertManyIfNewUnit [] = m
    source
    @[simp]
