    theorem Std.HashMap.insertManyIfNewUnit_list_singleton {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} {k : α} :
    m.insertManyIfNewUnit [k] = m.insertIfNew k ()
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.insertManyIfNewUnit_cons {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} {l : List α} {k : α} :
    m.insertManyIfNewUnit (k :: l) = (m.insertIfNew k ()).insertManyIfNewUnit l
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.insertManyIfNewUnit_ind {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ α] {motive : HashMap α Unit → Prop} (m : HashMap α Unit) (l : ρ) (init : motive m) (insert : ∀ (m : HashMap α Unit) (a : α), motive m → motive (m.insertIfNew a ())) :
    motive (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).contains k = (m.contains k || l.contains k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    k ∈ m.insertManyIfNewUnit l ↔ k ∈ m ∨ l.contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    k ∈ m.insertManyIfNewUnit l → k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_insertManyIfNewUnit_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} {k : α} :
    k ∈ m → k ∈ m.insertManyIfNewUnit l
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l)[k]? = if k ∈ m ∨ l.contains k = true then some () else none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} {l : List α} {k : α} {h : k ∈ m.insertManyIfNewUnit l} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l)[k] = ()
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} {l : List α} {k : α} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l)[k]! = ()
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} {l : List α} {k : α} {fallback : Unit} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getD k fallback = ()
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m) :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKey? k = m.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ m.insertManyIfNewUnit l} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m) {h : k ∈ m.insertManyIfNewUnit l} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKey k h = m.getKey k mem
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m) :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKey! k = m.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k fallback : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k fallback : α} (mem : k ∈ m) :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).getKeyD k fallback = m.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) :
    (∀ (a : α), a ∈ m → l.contains a = false) → (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).size = m.size + l.length
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_le_size_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_le_size_insertManyIfNewUnit {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_le {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).size ≤ m.size + l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).isEmpty = (m.isEmpty && l.isEmpty)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_of_isEmpty_insertManyIfNewUnit {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α Unit} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    (m.insertManyIfNewUnit l).isEmpty = true → m.isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.ofList_nil {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    ofList [] = ∅
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.ofList_singleton {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {k : α} {v : β} :
    ofList [(k, v)] = ∅.insert k v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.ofList_cons {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {k : α} {v : β} {tl : List (α × β)} :
    ofList ((k, v) :: tl) = (∅.insert k v).insertMany tl
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.ofList_eq_insertMany_empty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {l : List (α × β)} :
    ofList l = ∅.insertMany l
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_ofList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    (ofList l).contains k = (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_ofList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    k ∈ ofList l ↔ (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l)[k]? = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    (ofList l)[k']? = some v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ ofList l} :
    (ofList l)[k'] = v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} [Inhabited β] (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l)[k]! = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} [Inhabited β] (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    (ofList l)[k']! = v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} {fallback : β} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v fallback : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    (ofList l).getD k' fallback = v
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (ofList l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) {h : k' ∈ ofList l} :
    (ofList l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (ofList l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k fallback : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (ofList l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_ofList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) :
    (ofList l).size = l.length
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_ofList_le {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    (ofList l).size ≤ l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_ofList {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    (ofList l).isEmpty = l.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.unitOfList_nil {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    unitOfList [] = ∅
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.unitOfList_singleton {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {k : α} :
    unitOfList [k] = ∅.insertIfNew k ()
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.unitOfList_cons {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {hd : α} {tl : List α} :
    unitOfList (hd :: tl) = (∅.insertIfNew hd ()).insertManyIfNewUnit tl
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    (unitOfList l).contains k = l.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    k ∈ unitOfList l ↔ l.contains k = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    (unitOfList l)[k]? = if l.contains k = true then some () else none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {l : List α} {k : α} {h : k ∈ unitOfList l} :
    (unitOfList l)[k] = ()
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {l : List α} {k : α} :
    (unitOfList l)[k]! = ()
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {l : List α} {k : α} {fallback : Unit} :
    (unitOfList l).getD k fallback = ()
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_unitOfList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (unitOfList l).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_unitOfList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (unitOfList l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_unitOfList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ unitOfList l} :
    (unitOfList l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_unitOfList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (unitOfList l).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_unitOfList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (unitOfList l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_unitOfList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k fallback : α} (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (unitOfList l).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_unitOfList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (unitOfList l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) :
    (unitOfList l).size = l.length
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_unitOfList_le {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    (unitOfList l).size ≤ l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    (unitOfList l).isEmpty = l.isEmpty
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_alter_eq_isEmpty_erase {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).isEmpty = ((m.erase k).isEmpty && (f m[k]?).isNone)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).isEmpty = ((m.isEmpty || m.size == 1 && m.contains k) && (f m[k]?).isNone)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).contains k' = if (k == k') = true then (f m[k]?).isSome else m.contains k'
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    k' ∈ m.alter k f ↔ if (k == k') = true then (f m[k]?).isSome = true else k' ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_alter_of_beq {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : (k == k') = true) :
    k' ∈ m.alter k f ↔ (f m[k]?).isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).contains k = (f m[k]?).isSome
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    k ∈ m.alter k f ↔ (f m[k]?).isSome = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_alter_of_beq_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : (k == k') = false) :
    (m.alter k f).contains k' = m.contains k'
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_alter_of_beq_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : (k == k') = false) :
    k' ∈ m.alter k f ↔ k' ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).size = if k ∈ m ∧ (f m[k]?).isNone = true then m.size - 1 else if ¬k ∈ m ∧ (f m[k]?).isSome = true then m.size + 1 else m.size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_alter_eq_add_one {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : ¬k ∈ m) (h' : (f m[k]?).isSome = true) :
    (m.alter k f).size = m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_alter_eq_sub_one {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : k ∈ m) (h' : (f m[k]?).isNone = true) :
    (m.alter k f).size = m.size - 1
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_alter_eq_self_of_not_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : ¬k ∈ m) (h' : (f m[k]?).isNone = true) :
    (m.alter k f).size = m.size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_alter_eq_self_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : k ∈ m) (h' : (f m[k]?).isSome = true) :
    (m.alter k f).size = m.size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_alter_le_size {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).size ≤ m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_le_size_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    m.size - 1 ≤ (m.alter k f).size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f)[k']? = if (k == k') = true then f m[k]? else m[k']?
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f)[k]? = f m[k]?
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} {h : k' ∈ m.alter k f} :
    (m.alter k f)[k'] = if heq : (k == k') = true then (f m[k]?).get ⋯ else m[k']
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} {h : k ∈ m.alter k f} :
    (m.alter k f)[k] = (f m[k]?).get ⋯
    source

    (m.alter k f)[k']! = if (k == k') = true then (f m[k]?).get! else m[k']!
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} [Inhabited β] {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f)[k]! = (f m[k]?).get!
    source

    (m.alter k f).getD k' fallback = if (k == k') = true then (f m[k]?).getD fallback else m.getD k' fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).getD k fallback = (f m[k]?).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey? k' = if (k == k') = true then if (f m[k]?).isSome = true then some k else none else m.getKey? k'
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey? k = if (f m[k]?).isSome = true then some k else none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey! k' = if (k == k') = true then if (f m[k]?).isSome = true then k else default else m.getKey! k'
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey! k = if (f m[k]?).isSome = true then k else default
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} {h : k' ∈ m.alter k f} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey k' h = if heq : (k == k') = true then k else m.getKey k' ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} {h : k ∈ m.alter k f} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey k h = k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' fallback : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).getKeyD k' fallback = if (k == k') = true then if (f m[k]?).isSome = true then k else fallback else m.getKeyD k' fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k fallback : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (m.alter k f).getKeyD k fallback = if (f m[k]?).isSome = true then k else fallback
    source

    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_modify {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : β → β} :
    (m.modify k f).isEmpty = m.isEmpty

    (m.modify k f).contains k' = m.contains k'
    source

    k' ∈ m.modify k f ↔ k' ∈ m

    (m.modify k f).size = m.size

    source

    m₁.Equiv m₂ → m₂.Equiv m₃ → m₁.Equiv m₃

    Trans Equiv Equiv Equiv

    • Std.HashMap.Equiv.instTrans = { trans := ⋯ }

    m₁.Equiv m₂ ↔ m₂.Equiv m₁

    source

    m₁.contains k = m₂.contains k
    source

    (m₁.insertIfNew k v).Equiv (m₂.insertIfNew k v)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (l : List (α × β)) (h : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (m₁.insertMany l).Equiv (m₂.insertMany l)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α Unit} (l : List α) (h : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (m₁.insertManyIfNewUnit l).Equiv (m₂.insertManyIfNewUnit l)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.alter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (k : α) (f : Option β → Option β) (h : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (m₁.alter k f).Equiv (m₂.alter k f)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.modify {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (k : α) (f : β → β) (h : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (m₁.modify k f).Equiv (m₂.modify k f)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} (f : α → β → Bool) (h : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (HashMap.filter f m₁).Equiv (HashMap.filter f m₂)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} (f : α → β → γ) (h : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (HashMap.map f m₁).Equiv (HashMap.map f m₂)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} (f : α → β → Option γ) (h : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (HashMap.filterMap f m₁).Equiv (HashMap.filterMap f m₂)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.of_forall_getKey_eq_of_forall_getElem?_eq {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (hk : ∀ (k : α) (hk : k ∈ m₁) (hk' : k ∈ m₂), m₁.getKey k hk = m₂.getKey k hk') (hv : ∀ (k : α), m₁[k]? = m₂[k]?) :
    m₁.Equiv m₂
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.of_forall_getElem?_eq {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] (h : ∀ (k : α), m₁[k]? = m₂[k]?) :
    m₁.Equiv m₂
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.of_forall_getKey?_unit_eq {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α Unit} (h : ∀ (k : α), m₁.getKey? k = m₂.getKey? k) :
    m₁.Equiv m₂
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.of_forall_contains_unit_eq {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α Unit} (h : ∀ (k : α), m₁.contains k = m₂.contains k) :
    m₁.Equiv m₂
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.Equiv.of_forall_mem_unit_iff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α Unit} (h : ∀ (k : α), k ∈ m₁ ↔ k ∈ m₂) :
    m₁.Equiv m₂
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.equiv_emptyWithCapacity_iff_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {c : Nat} :
    m.Equiv (emptyWithCapacity c) ↔ m.isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.equiv_empty_iff_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.Equiv ∅ ↔ m.isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.emptyWithCapacity_equiv_iff_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).Equiv m ↔ m.isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.empty_equiv_iff_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    ∅.Equiv m ↔ m.isEmpty = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.equiv_iff_toList_perm {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m₁.Equiv m₂ ↔ m₁.toList.Perm m₂.toList
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.equiv_iff_keys_unit_perm {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : HashMap α Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m₁.Equiv m₂ ↔ m₁.keys.Perm m₂.keys
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.toList_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {f : α → β → Option γ} :
    (filterMap f m).toList.Perm (List.filterMap (fun (p : α × β) => Option.map (fun (x : γ) => (p.fst, x)) (f p.fst p.snd)) m.toList)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_filterMap_iff {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} :
    (filterMap f m).isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) m[k] = none
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_filterMap_eq_false_iff {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} :
    (filterMap f m).isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (k : α), ∃ (h : k ∈ m), (f (m.getKey k h) m[k]).isSome = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} :
    k ∈ filterMap f m ↔ ∃ (h : k ∈ m), (f (m.getKey k h) m[k]).isSome = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_of_contains_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} :
    (filterMap f m).contains k = true → m.contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} :
    k ∈ filterMap f m → k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_filterMap_le_size {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} :
    (filterMap f m).size ≤ m.size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_filterMap_eq_size_iff {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} :
    (filterMap f m).size = m.size ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), (f (m.getKey k h) m[k]).isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} :
    (filterMap f m)[k]? = m[k]?.pbind fun (x : β) (h' : m[k]? = some x) => f (m.getKey k ⋯) x
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_filterMap' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} :
    (filterMap f m)[k]? = m[k]?.bind fun (x : β) => f k x

    Simpler variant of getElem?_filterMap when LawfulBEq is available.

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_filterMap_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k k' : α} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
    (filterMap f m)[k]? = m[k]?.bind (f k')
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isSome_apply_of_mem_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} (h : k ∈ filterMap f m) :
    (f (m.getKey k ⋯) m[k]).isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} {h : k ∈ filterMap f m} :
    (filterMap f m)[k] = (f (m.getKey k ⋯) m[k]).get ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_filterMap' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} {h : k ∈ filterMap f m} :
    (filterMap f m)[k] = (f k m[k]).get ⋯

    Simpler variant of getElem_filterMap when LawfulBEq is available.

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} :
    (filterMap f m)[k]! = (m[k]?.pbind fun (x : β) (h' : m[k]? = some x) => f (m.getKey k ⋯) x).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_filterMap' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} :
    (filterMap f m)[k]! = (m[k]?.bind (f k)).get!

    Simpler variant of getElem!_filterMap when LawfulBEq is available.

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_filterMap_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k k' : α} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
    (filterMap f m)[k]! = (m[k]?.bind (f k')).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} {fallback : γ} :
    (filterMap f m).getD k fallback = (m[k]?.pbind fun (x : β) (h' : m[k]? = some x) => f (m.getKey k ⋯) x).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_filterMap' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} {fallback : γ} :
    (filterMap f m).getD k fallback = (m[k]?.bind (f k)).getD fallback

    Simpler variant of getD_filterMap when LawfulBEq is available.

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_filterMap_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k k' : α} {fallback : γ} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
    (filterMap f m).getD k fallback = (m[k]?.bind (f k')).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} :
    (filterMap f m).getKey? k = (m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => (f x m[x]).isSome
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ filterMap f m} :
    (filterMap f m).getKey k h' = m.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k : α} :
    (filterMap f m).getKey! k = ((m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => (f x m[x]).isSome).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Option γ} {k fallback : α} :
    (filterMap f m).getKeyD k fallback = ((m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => (f x m[x]).isSome).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.filterMap_equiv_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {f : α → β → Bool} :
    (filterMap (fun (k : α) => Option.guard fun (v : β) => f k v) m).Equiv (filter f m)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.toList_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {f : α → β → Bool} :
    (filter f m).toList.Perm (List.filter (fun (p : α × β) => f p.fst p.snd) m.toList)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.keys_filter_key {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {f : α → Bool} :
    (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β) => f k) m).keys.Perm (List.filter f m.keys)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_filter_iff {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
    (filter f m).isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) m[k] = false
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_filter_eq_false_iff {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
    (filter f m).isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (k : α), ∃ (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) m[k] = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
    k ∈ filter f m ↔ ∃ (h' : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h') m[k] = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_of_contains_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
    (filter f m).contains k = true → m.contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
    k ∈ filter f m → k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_filter_le_size {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
    (filter f m).size ≤ m.size
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_filter_eq_size_iff {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
    (filter f m).size = m.size ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) (m.get k h) = true
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.filter_equiv_self_iff {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
    (filter f m).Equiv m ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) (m.get k h) = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
    (filter f m)[k]? = m[k]?.pfilter fun (x : β) (h' : m[k]? = some x) => f (m.getKey k ⋯) x
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_filter' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
    (filter f m)[k]? = Option.filter (f k) m[k]?

    Simpler variant of getElem?_filter when LawfulBEq is available.

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_filter_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k k' : α} :
    m.getKey? k = some k' → (filter f m)[k]? = Option.filter (fun (x : β) => f k' x) m[k]?
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ filter f m} :
    (filter f m)[k] = m[k]
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
    (filter f m)[k]! = (m[k]?.pfilter fun (x : β) (h' : m[k]? = some x) => f (m.getKey k ⋯) x).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_filter' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited β] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
    (filter f m)[k]! = (Option.filter (f k) m[k]?).get!

    Simpler variant of getElem!_filter when LawfulBEq is available.

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_filter_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {f : α → β → Bool} {k k' : α} :
    m.getKey? k = some k' → (filter f m)[k]! = (Option.filter (f k') m[k]?).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} {fallback : β} :
    (filter f m).getD k fallback = (m[k]?.pfilter fun (x : β) (h' : m[k]? = some x) => f (m.getKey k ⋯) x).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_filter' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} {fallback : β} :
    (filter f m).getD k fallback = (Option.filter (f k) m[k]?).getD fallback

    Simpler variant of getD_filter when LawfulBEq is available.

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_filter_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k k' : α} {fallback : β} :
    m.getKey? k = some k' → (filter f m).getD k fallback = (Option.filter (fun (x : β) => f k' x) m[k]?).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.keys_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
    (filter f m).keys.Perm (List.filter (fun (x : { x : α // x ∈ m.keys }) => match x with | ⟨x, h'⟩ => f x (m.get x ⋯)) m.keys.attach).unattach
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
    (filter f m).getKey? k = (m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => f x m[x]
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_filter_key {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → Bool} {k : α} :
    (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β) => f k) m).getKey? k = Option.filter f (m.getKey? k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ filter f m} :
    (filter f m).getKey k h' = m.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
    (filter f m).getKey! k = ((m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => f x m[x]).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_filter_key {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {f : α → Bool} {k : α} :
    (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β) => f k) m).getKey! k = (Option.filter f (m.getKey? k)).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_filter {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k fallback : α} :
    (filter f m).getKeyD k fallback = ((m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => f x m[x]).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_filter_key {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → Bool} {k fallback : α} :
    (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β) => f k) m).getKeyD k fallback = (Option.filter f (m.getKey? k)).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.map_id_equiv {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} :
    (map (fun (x : α) (v : β) => v) m).Equiv m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.map_map_equiv {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {δ : Type w'} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {f : α → β → γ} {g : α → γ → δ} :
    (map g (map f m)).Equiv (map (fun (k : α) (v : β) => g k (f k v)) m)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.toList_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {f : α → β → γ} :
    (map f m).toList.Perm (List.map (fun (p : α × β) => (p.fst, f p.fst p.snd)) m.toList)
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.keys_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} {f : α → β → γ} :
    (map f m).keys.Perm m.keys
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.filterMap_equiv_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} :
    (filterMap (fun (k : α) (v : β) => some (f k v)) m).Equiv (map f m)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.isEmpty_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} :
    (map f m).isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    (map f m).contains k = m.contains k
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.contains_of_contains_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    (map f m).contains k = true → m.contains k = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    k ∈ map f m ↔ k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.mem_of_mem_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    k ∈ map f m → k ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.size_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} :
    (map f m).size = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    (map f m)[k]? = Option.map (f k) m[k]?
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_map' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    (map f m)[k]? = Option.pmap (fun (v : β) (h' : k ∈ m) => f (m.getKey k h') v) m[k]? ⋯

    Variant of getElem?_map that holds with EquivBEq (i.e. without LawfulBEq).

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem?_map_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k k' : α} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
    (map f m)[k]? = Option.map (f k') m[k]?
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ map f m} :
    (map f m)[k] = f k m[k]
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem_map' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ map f m} :
    (map f m)[k] = f (m.getKey k ⋯) m[k]

    Variant of getElem_map that holds with EquivBEq (i.e. without LawfulBEq).

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    (map f m)[k]! = (Option.map (f k) m[k]?).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_map' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    (map f m)[k]! = (Option.pmap (fun (v : β) (h : k ∈ m) => f (m.getKey k h) v) m[k]? ⋯).get!

    Variant of getElem!_map that holds with EquivBEq (i.e. without LawfulBEq).

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getElem!_map_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → γ} {k k' : α} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
    (map f m)[k]! = (Option.map (f k') m[k]?).get!
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} {fallback : γ} :
    (map f m).getD k fallback = (Option.map (f k) m[k]?).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_map' {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} {fallback : γ} :
    (map f m).getD k fallback = (Option.pmap (fun (v : β) (h : k ∈ m) => f (m.getKey k h) v) m[k]? ⋯).getD fallback

    Variant of getD_map that holds with EquivBEq (i.e. without LawfulBEq).

    source
    theorem Std.HashMap.getD_map_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → γ} {k k' : α} {fallback : γ} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
    (map f m).getD k fallback = (Option.map (f k') m[k]?).getD fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey?_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    (map f m).getKey? k = m.getKey? k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ map f m} :
    (map f m).getKey k h' = m.getKey k ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKey!_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
    (map f m).getKey! k = m.getKey! k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.HashMap.getKeyD_map {α : Type u} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : HashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k fallback : α} :
    (map f m).getKeyD k fallback = m.getKeyD k fallback
